major_transits.name: Sade Sati
major_transits.trigger: Saturn transiting natal Moon sign, sign before, or sign after

phases.theme: Mental unrest, preparation, external changes begin
Peak intensity — core life restructuring, maximum karmic pressure

remedies: Wear iron ring on middle finger
major_transits.positive_aspects: Builds character, removes shallow attachments, creates enduring foundations
major_transits.message_india: Sade Sati is beginning — Shani Dev is restructuring your life for karmic growth. Discipline, service, and patience are your armor.
major_transits.message_usa: A significant Saturn restructuring cycle is activating — old structures that don't serve your growth will be cleared to make way for what's truly lasting.
major_transits.message_latam: El período de Sade Sati comienza — una transformación profunda que elimina lo que ya no sirve para revelar tu esencia más auténtica.

major_transits.name: Guru Peyarchi (Jupiter Transit)
major_transits.trigger: Jupiter transiting over natal Lagna, 5th house, or 9th house
major_transits.message_india: Guru Peyarchi — Jupiter is blessing your lagna/5th/9th. Expand in all directions. This period brings marriage, children, education, and prosperity.
major_transits.message_usa: Jupiter's blessing transit — a one-year window of expansion, opportunity, and good fortune. Act toward your biggest goals now.
major_transits.message_latam: Tránsito de Júpiter — un año de abundancia, expansión y bendiciones. Este es tu momento de crecer.

major_transits.name: Rahu-Ketu Axis Shift
major_transits.trigger: Rahu and Ketu changing signs (every 18 months)
major_transits.message_india: Rahu-Ketu axis is shifting — major life themes are changing. New obsessions, new releases. Stay anchored in dharma.
major_transits.message_usa: The Rahu-Ketu axis is shifting — the areas of life where you're hungry for growth and where you need to release are changing.
major_transits.message_latam: El eje Rahu-Ketu cambia — nuevos temas de crecimiento y liberación se activan en tu vida.

major_transits.name: Saturn Return
major_transits.trigger: Saturn transiting its natal position in birth chart
major_transits.message: Saturn Return — life's most significant crossroad. Saturn demands you shed what is inauthentic and commit fully to your true path. The decisions made now echo for the next 29 years.

major_transits.name: Jupiter Return
major_transits.message: Jupiter Return — a year of fresh expansion, wisdom upgrades, and new opportunities aligned with your deeper purpose.

Saturn.1: Identity restructuring, health focus, new beginnings under pressure
Saturn.2: Financial discipline required, family responsibilities increase
Saturn.3: Hard work in communication, sibling matters, short trips with effort
Saturn.4: Home changes, mother's health, property challenges
Saturn.5: Creative and children challenges, disciplined romance
Saturn.6: Health improvement through discipline, work intensifies, victory over enemies
Saturn.7: Relationship restructuring, marriage under examination, business discipline
Saturn.8: Transformation, inheritance matters, deep karmic clearing
Saturn.9: Dharma challenges, father's health, philosophical restructuring
Saturn.10: Career discipline and restructuring, reputation under scrutiny
Saturn.11: Slow but steady gains, friend circle changes, long-term goals crystalize
Saturn.12: Isolation, foreign matters, spiritual growth, hidden karmic clearing

Jupiter.1: New cycle of expansion, health improvement, fresh optimism
Jupiter.2: Financial expansion, family blessings, wealth increase
Jupiter.4: Home expansion, property gains, mother's wellbeing
Jupiter.5: Children blessings, creative breakthrough, romantic expansion
Jupiter.6: Victory over enemies, health improvement, service opportunities
Jupiter.7: Marriage blessings, partnership success, relationship harmony
Jupiter.9: Peak fortune, father's wellbeing, spiritual expansion, travel
Jupiter.10: Career peak, recognition, promotion, status rise
Jupiter.11: Maximum gains, dreams fulfilled, social expansion
Jupiter.12: Spiritual growth, foreign travel, charitable activity

eclipse_rules.auspicious_after_eclipse: 3 days after eclipse passes — new beginnings are powerfully supported

rahu_kaal.description: Daily inauspicious 90-minute window ruled by Rahu
rahu_kaal.note: Exact timing varies by location and sunrise time — calculate from local sunrise

ashtakavarga_thresholds.description: Points (0-8) each planet receives in each sign based on natal positions

very_favorable.message: Strong transit — act on this planet's significations

neutral.message: Ordinary transit — neither helped nor harmed

challenging.message: Weak transit — exercise caution in this area

very_challenging.message: Very weak transit — delays and obstacles likely
